column13: Developed a Salesforce Car Rental Management application using custom objects to manage cars, bookings, payments, and customer reviews. Implemented validation rules, approval processes, flows, and custom metadata to automate business logic and data.
column14: Built a Salesforce-based Car Rental Management system using custom objects such as Car, Booking, Payment Transaction, Review, and Coupon Code to manage rental operations. Implemented validation rules and custom metadata to enforce business constraints like date validation and discount thresholds. Automated processes using approval workflows, record-triggered flows, and roll-up logic to calculate final booking prices. Developed Lightning Web Components and screen flows to allow users to filter cars by budget and color, estimate booking costs, and submit reviews for service feedback.
column15: Apex, LWC, Javascrpt, Flows, Screenflow, Approval Process, Validation Rules, Triggers, Trigger Fraemework

column13: Developed a Lightning Web Components application that integrates with the OMDb API to search movies and display results as interactive tiles, allowing users to view detailed information for a selected title using Lightning Message Service.
column14: Built a Salesforce Lightning Web Components (LWC) application that enables users to search movies, series, and episodes using the public OMDb API. Implemented a responsive UI with debounced search, filters, and a scrollable grid of movie tiles that display search results. Used Lightning Message Service for communication between components to load and display detailed movie information dynamically. Designed the solution using modular LWC components, custom message channels, and standard Salesforce development practices within an SFDX project structure.
column15: LWC, Communication between Child and Parent, Communication between two unrelated components, Message Channel, calling Api from LWC

column13: A personal portfolio website built on Salesforce Experience Cloud using Lightning Web Components (LWC). The application showcases professional experience, projects, education, certifications, and technical skills through an interactive and responsive user
column14: This project is a personal portfolio website developed on Salesforce Experience Cloud using Lightning Web Components (LWC) to demonstrate modern web development on the Salesforce platform. The application displays experience, projects, education, certifications, and skills through an interactive UI with animated timelines and project modals. Data is managed using Salesforce custom objects and retrieved through Apex controllers. The project follows the Salesforce DX structure with LWC components for the frontend, Apex for server-side logic, and static resources for images and assets.

column13: Developed a reusable Lightning Web Component that provides a configurable multi-select lookup with type-ahead server-side search and record pill management for selecting multiple Salesforce records.
column14: Built a reusable Lightning Web Component (LWC) that delivers a multi-select lookup experience for Salesforce records with dynamic, server-side search. Implemented features such as type-ahead suggestions, keyboard navigation, and selected records displayed as removable pills. Designed the component to emit selection events so it can integrate easily with parent components, record pages, or flows. Created the component with a flexible and reusable architecture to support configurable objects and fields across different use cases.

column13: Implemented a Salesforce–Spotify integration that allows users to search tracks and artists directly within Salesforce using a Lightning Web Component, secured with OAuth via Auth Provider, External Credential, and Named Credential.
column14: Developed a secure integration between Salesforce and the Spotify Web API to enable in-app music search functionality. Implemented OAuth 2.0 authentication using Auth Provider, External Credential, and Named Credential to securely manage API access without exposing secrets. Built a Lightning Web Component for a responsive search interface and an Apex service class to handle API callouts, response parsing, and error handling. Configured permission sets and structured metadata deployment to ensure secure access and maintainable integration within Salesforce.
column15: Rest API, Named Credential, Auth Provider, External Credential, LWC, Apex

column13: Built a Salesforce Lightning Web Component that enables users to export Salesforce records to CSV, using an Apex controller for secure, bulkified data retrieval and CSV generation.
column14: Developed a Salesforce DX application that allows users to export Salesforce data to CSV through a guided Lightning Web Component interface. The component lets users select objects, fields, and filters, while an Apex controller handles secure SOQL queries, applies sharing and FLS, and generates a standards-compliant CSV file. The solution follows Salesforce best practices with reusable LWC design, bulkified and exception-safe Apex, and no hardcoded IDs. Configured the project for deployment using SFDX, package.xml, and sf CLI, ensuring easy setup and reliable CSV exports across environments.
column15: LWC, csv file downoad, Apex, DataTable
